message:
fix(reactor,tests): clarify uring.rs module status and harden stub audit probes

uring.rs: Update doc comment to accurately reflect that this file is not
part of the compiled module graph (mod.rs maps `mod uring` to io_uring.rs
via #[path]). The previous comment implied it was an active deprecated
shim, which was misleading.

stub_resolution_audit.rs:
- Probes 02/03 (quorum/try_join macros): widen cfg-guard lookback window
  from 3 to 5 lines to avoid false negatives when the #[cfg] attribute
  is separated from the macro_rules! by doc comments or blank lines
- Probe 08: replace naive "contains Unsupported" check on a non-existent
  macos.rs with a structural probe that verifies the kqueue module in
  mod.rs is properly platform-gated behind target_os cfg attributes,
  matching the actual architecture where kqueue.rs only compiles on BSD

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
